villeneuve: vast scale, slow deliberate moves, symmetry, long lenses, atmosphere and fog, muted palette
deakins: motivated naturalistic light, restrained elegant moves, negative space, silhouettes
kubrick: one-point symmetry, wide lenses, slow zooms, centred framing, corridors
wong_kar_wai: warm saturated palette, intimate handheld, slow-shutter smear, frames within frames
fincher: precise, cold, controlled dollies, desaturated teal, deep shadow, locked composition
malick: golden-hour, wandering handheld, sky and nature, wide lenses, backlight
anderson: flat frontal symmetry, whip pans, primary palette, dollhouse tableaux
tarkovsky: very slow, long takes, natural texture, water and light, contemplative
